paper.title: Scaling Laws for Reward Model Overoptimization
paper.summary: We study the effect of optimizing against a reward model and characterize the overoptimization regime across model scales.

paper.title: Mixture-of-Depths: Dynamically Allocating Compute in Transformers
paper.summary: A method to dynamically allocate FLOPs across tokens and layers in transformer language models.

paper.title: Retrieval-Augmented Diffusion for Long-Context Generation
paper.summary: We augment diffusion language models with retrieval to extend usable context windows.
